entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for aflatoxin contamination and resistance.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnuts, a serious problem in producing countries.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution conducting the study on aflatoxin in groundnuts.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Toxigenic fungus that causes seed invasion, colonization, and aflatoxin production in groundnuts.

entities.name: SEED INVASION
entities.description: The ability of Aspergillus flavus to enter the seeds of groundnuts.

entities.name: COLONIZATION
entities.description: The ability of Aspergillus flavus to establish itself within groundnut seeds.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process by which Aspergillus flavus produces aflatoxins in groundnut seeds.

entities.name: MOISTURE
entities.description: Environmental factor in stored groundnuts that permits fungal growth.

entities.name: FIELD RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to seed invasion by Aspergillus flavus under natural or inoculated field conditions.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating cultivars for field resistance to fungal invasion.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of identifying cultivars resistant to seed invasion, colonization, and aflatoxin production.
